Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Mike Davis at HK49.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Mike Davis
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Mike Davis

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Mike Davis
Out of the Cage - Mike Davis
Out of the Cage - Mike Davis

Video.summary: Coach Dan Miller puts his wealth of experience and knowledge into helping fighters train properly and get ready to step into the cage the right way. He considers it a gift to be able to help Jess Elverum's MMA career.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - Dan Miller
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - Dan Miller

Image.alt: Day in the Life of a Coach - Dan Miller
Day in the Life of a Coach - Dan Miller
Day in the Life of a Coach - Dan Miller

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 44 kicks off with an Amateur Title Fight between wrestler Justin Basra and John 'The Dragon' Nguyen. This is followed by pros Zach Snyder vs. Kolton Menzak. Wrapping up this episode with the Main Event is Corey Devela vs. UFC Veteran Nick 'The Promise' Ring, who keeps going after five knee surgeries. You do not want to miss it!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 44 continues with two action-packed Light Heavyweight matchups. Anton Tokarchuk takes on Josh Heinz, and UFC Veteran Rodney Wallace goes the distance against Kalib Starnes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 2
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 2

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 2
Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 2
Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 2

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Jenn Wolstenholme
Video.grandparentTitle: Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme
Video.title: Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme

Image.alt: Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme
Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme
Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme

Finish of the Day - Alex Martinez v. Cody Purtell - HKFC

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 45 opens with a pro match between always threatening Zach Manywounds and Trenton Rowell, hungry for his first win. Following is Keegan ""the Condition"" Oliver vs. Hard Knocks newcomer, Vaz Lep. The main event of the evening is welterweight matchup between two exciting Hard Knocks veterans: Joel Powell vs. Adam Smith.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 1
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 1

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 1
